meaning: n.[物]十亿电子伏,千兆电子伏
examples: Bev was really cool about it all.
Bev made her laugh, the way she was always clowning around.
Beverly, but please call me Bev.
Jennie S. Bev is a regular columnist to Forbes Indonesia, The Jakarta Post, and Strategic Review.
Like several of its peers, Toyota never fully committed to bringing a BEV to the masses.
